nodes.title: James A. Sterling

body.processed: James Sterling is the founding partner of Sterling & Associates and has led the firm for over 35 years. His practice focuses on complex commercial litigation and corporate transactions. He has been recognized by Best Lawyers in America and Super Lawyers for his outstanding legal work.

body.processed: Sarah Chen is a senior partner specializing in real estate law and corporate transactions. She has closed over $3 billion in commercial real estate deals and is recognized as a leading practitioner in the field. She frequently speaks at industry conferences on emerging trends in real estate finance.

nodes.title: Michael D. Rodriguez

body.processed: Michael Rodriguez heads the firm's employment law practice. With over 20 years of experience, he advises Fortune 500 companies on complex employment matters and has successfully defended employers in high-stakes litigation across the country.
